patches.name: KH2FM Ultrawide Aspect Ratio
patches.description: Replaces the hardcoded 16:9 aspect ratio float in KINGDOM HEARTS II FINAL MIX.exe with your configured screen ratio. The float lives in a display-mode data table (alongside supported resolution heights 720/900/1080/1440/1920/2160/3840) and is the only occurrence of the 16:9 constant in the exe. Apply before launching the game.

sites.notes: Data table entry at 0x005FCE08. The float 1.7777 (AC 8B E3 3F) is the only 16:9 constant in the exe. Followed immediately by resolution height values: 720, 900, 1080, 1440, 1920, 2160, 3840.

patches.name: KH1FM Ultrawide Aspect Ratio
patches.description: Replaces the hardcoded 16:9 aspect ratio float in KINGDOM HEARTS FINAL MIX.exe with your configured screen ratio. Same single-site structure as the KH2FM patch. Apply before launching the game.

sites.notes: Data table entry at 0x003DFB20. The float 1.7777 (AC 8B E3 3F) is the only 16:9 constant in the exe. Same resolution table structure as KH2FM.
